chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 407 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.09.2025 Mr. Nazeer Ali Aradin, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicants files statement along with certified copy of order dated 04.09.2025 passed by learned Judicial Magistrate, Sobho Dero at Ranipur in Cr. Case No.114/2024, and states that the bail application may be disposed of as not pressed on account of the applicants having been acquitted in the present matter by learned trial Court. Bail application stands disposed of as not pressed accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
